neighborhoods.name: Downtown / Grand Central
neighborhoods.description: Walkable arts district with Dali Museum, murals, craft breweries, and waterfront parks
neighborhoods.character: Arts district, Dali Museum, murals, waterfront
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of St. Petersburg. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living St. Petersburg

neighborhoods.name: Gulfport
neighborhoods.description: Quirky waterfront village within St. Pete with art walks, Stetson Law School, and artist community
neighborhoods.character: Quirky waterfront village, art walks, artist community

housing.predominantType: Bungalows, cottages, and small waterfront homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to St. Petersburg's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living St. Petersburg

neighborhoods.name: Pinellas Park / Kenneth City
neighborhoods.description: Central Pinellas communities with affordable housing, diverse communities, and good location

housing.predominantType: Ranch houses, mobile homes, and modest apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living St. Petersburg

neighborhoods.name: Shore Acres / Snell Isle
neighborhoods.description: Waterfront neighborhoods with canal access, parks, and family-oriented community

housing.predominantType: Waterfront homes, ranch houses, and canal properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living St. Petersburg
